---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for CLIver
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples from other tools, or references.
